summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Special Order (OD) feature - Sub-fase 1.12. Backend APIs: 100% pass rate (17/17 tests). Fixed 2 permission bugs. Frontend: Page loads correctly with all UI components, but has session validation error when loading order list.

fixed_bugs.issue: Permission check inconsistency - used 'order.edit' instead of 'order.update'
fixed_bugs.impact: PATCH endpoint was returning 403 for all users

fixed_bugs.issue: Permission check inconsistency - used 'order.manage' (non-existent) instead of 'order.update'
fixed_bugs.impact: Status transition endpoint was returning 403 for manager role

design_considerations.current_behavior: Only admin role can delete (soft delete/cancel) draft special orders
design_considerations.consideration: Sales users might need ability to cancel their own draft orders. Currently requires admin intervention.
design_considerations.recommendation: Consider adding 'delete' permission to sales role for order module, or create separate 'cancel_own' permission

critical_bugs.issue: Session validation error when loading special orders list
critical_bugs.error_message: Gagal memuat special orders: Session tidak valid
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot see the list of special orders, though page loads correctly
possible_causes: Token not being passed correctly in Authorization header

integration_issues.issue: Frontend shows 'Session tidak valid' error when calling GET /api/special-orders
integration_issues.backend_status: Backend API works correctly (tested via backend_test.py with 100% success)
integration_issues.frontend_behavior: Error displayed in red banner, empty state shown

passed_tests: Backend: Authentication for all roles (admin, sales, manager)
Backend: List special orders with filters
Backend: Create special order below threshold (< 10M IDR) - status: draft
Backend: Create special order above threshold (> 10M IDR) - status: pending_approval
Backend: Get special order detail by ID
Backend: List with status filter (pending_approval)
Backend: Update draft order (PATCH) - notes and expected_delivery
Backend: Approve special order (manager role)
Backend: Status transition: confirmed → in_production
Backend: Status transition: in_production → ready
Backend: Status transition: ready → shipped
Backend: Status transition: shipped → done
Backend: Reject special order with reason
Backend: Delete draft order (soft delete to cancelled)
Backend: Invalid status transition returns 400 error
Backend: Sales role cannot approve orders (403 forbidden)
Backend: Approval threshold logic (10 million IDR)
Frontend: Navigation to Special Orders page via sidebar
Frontend: Page loads with correct title and subtitle
Frontend: Empty state displays correctly
Frontend: Create button visible and clickable
Frontend: Search box present
Frontend: Status filter tabs present (Semua/Draft/Menunggu Approval/etc)
Frontend: UI components render without JavaScript errors

critical.item: Fix session validation error in Special Orders list loading
critical.details: Frontend shows 'Gagal memuat special orders: Session tidak valid' when calling GET /api/special-orders. Backend API works correctly (verified via direct testing). Issue is in frontend token handling or authentication flow.
files_to_check: Axios interceptors or API client configuration
critical.suggested_fix: Verify token is being retrieved from localStorage and passed in Authorization header. Check if token format is correct (Bearer <token>). Ensure token hasn't expired.

medium.item: Consider permission design for draft order deletion
medium.details: Currently only admin can delete draft orders. Sales users might need ability to cancel their own drafts.
medium.suggested_fix: Either add 'delete' permission to sales role in permissions_config.py, or implement 'cancel_own' permission logic

frontend_tests.navigation: ✅ PASS - Can navigate to Special Orders page
frontend_tests.page_load: ✅ PASS - Page renders with correct components
frontend_tests.ui_components: ✅ PASS - All buttons, inputs, filters present
frontend_tests.data_loading: ❌ FAIL - Session validation error prevents list loading
frontend_tests.form_interaction: ⚠️  UNTESTED - Could not test due to session issue
frontend_tests.create_flow: ⚠️  UNTESTED - Could not complete due to session issue
frontend_tests.approval_flow: ⚠️  UNTESTED - Could not test due to session issue

testing_notes.backend: All backend APIs tested successfully with 100% pass rate. Fixed 2 permission bugs during testing. Approval threshold (10M IDR), status transitions, and role-based permissions all working correctly.
testing_notes.frontend: Frontend UI loads and renders correctly. Navigation works. However, there's a critical session validation error when loading the special orders list. This prevents full end-to-end testing of create/approve/status transition flows. Backend APIs work correctly when tested directly, so issue is in frontend token handling.
testing_notes.environment: Testing performed on https://wms-erp-multi-entity.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend running on port 8001, frontend on port 3000. All services running via supervisor.
